questions.question: What prompted the following observation: Dis aliter visum? Choose one of: The death of Rhipeus, Dido's temple frescoes, The treachery of Sinon.
What prompted the following observation: Sunt lacrimae rerum? Choose one of: The death of Rhipeus, Dido's temple frescoes, The treachery of Sinon.
What prompted the following observation: Ab uno disce omnes? Choose one of: The death of Rhipeus, Dido's temple frescoes, The treachery of Sinon.
Where do we first meet Aeneas? Choose one of: In the storm off Carthage, In the temple of Juno, Asleep in Ardea.
Where do we first meet Dido? Choose one of: In the storm off Carthage, In the temple of Juno, Asleep in Ardea.
Where do we first meet Turnus? Choose one of: In the storm off Carthage, In the temple of Juno, Asleep in Ardea.
Who was the priest of Apollo at Delos? Choose one of: Anius, Deiphobe, Calybe.
Who was the priestess of Apollo at Cumae? Choose one of: Anius, Deiphobe, Calybe.
Who was the priestess of Juno at Ardea? Choose one of: Anius, Deiphobe, Calybe.
How many heads had the watchdog Cerberus? Choose one of: Three, Fifty, A hundred.
How many throats had the Lernean Hydra? Choose one of: Three, Fifty, A hundred.
How many hands had the giant Aegaeon? Choose one of: Three, Fifty, A hundred.
Who is described as iustissimus unus qui fuit in Teucris? Choose one of: Rhipeus, Celaeno, Polyphemus.
Who is described as Furiarum ... maxima? Choose one of: Rhipeus, Celaeno, Polyphemus.
Who is described as monstrum horrendum informe ingens? Choose one of: Rhipeus, Celaeno, Polyphemus.
Who was the father of Dido? Choose one of: Belus, Metabus, Cisseus.
Who was the father of Camilla? Choose one of: Belus, Metabus, Cisseus.
Who was the father of Hecuba? Choose one of: Belus, Metabus, Cisseus.
Who assumed the form of Camers? Choose one of: Juturna, Iris, Allecto.
Who assumed the form of Beroe? Choose one of: Juturna, Iris, Allecto.
Who assumed the form of Calybe? Choose one of: Juturna, Iris, Allecto.
Who is compared with a swan? Choose one of: Lycus, Camilla, Juturna.
Who is compared with a hawk? Choose one of: Lycus, Camilla, Juturna.
Who is compared with a swallow? Choose one of: Lycus, Camilla, Juturna.
Who was the first to suggest dragging the Horse into Troy? Choose one of: Thymoetes, Coroebus, Tolumnius.
Who was the first to suggest that the Trojans don Greek armour? Choose one of: Thymoetes, Coroebus, Tolumnius.
Who was the first to break the second truce? Choose one of: Thymoetes, Coroebus, Tolumnius.
Who said: Discite iustitiam moniti et non temnere divos? Choose one of: Phlegyas, Aeneas, Mercury.
Who said: Una salus victis nullam sperare salutem? Choose one of: Phlegyas, Aeneas, Mercury.
Who said: Varium et mutabile semper femina? Choose one of: Phlegyas, Aeneas, Mercury.
